message:
feat(mermaid): add gitGraph terminal renderer (bd-hudcn.1.7.2)

Add gitGraph-specific rendering to mermaid_render.rs:
- Branch lane lines with per-lane coloring (6-color palette)
- Commit node glyphs: filled circle (Unicode) / asterisk (ASCII)
- Label rendering with truncation for narrow terminals
- Dedicated render path in render() and render_with_plan()
- Bypasses generic node/edge rendering for gitGraph diagrams

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
